summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five independent open pull requests. No GitHub mutations are planned. Four non-security PRs have narrow maintainer-safe repair paths: re-fetch full live PR state, hydrate reviews and bot comments, refresh/rebase if needed, run Codex /review, run the targeted validation listed below, then reconsider merge. PR #77736 is routed to central security handling because the validator requires route_security for that exact PR.

actions.reason: Independent narrow PR appears repairable, but merge cannot be recommended without complete merge preflight.
Potentially useful PR, but compatibility-scoped change plus waiting-on-author label and unresolved bot-review hydration make merge unsafe in this plan.
Independent focused PR appears repairable, but waiting-on-author state and missing merge preflight block merge recommendation.
Exact PR is quarantined for central OpenClaw security handling; no merge, close, comment, label, or fix action should be emitted for this item by ProjectClownfish.
Independent focused PR appears repairable, but merge cannot be recommended without complete merge preflight.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair the four non-security contributor PRs in place before any merge decision. The concrete repair is preflight completion, not replacement: re-fetch full live PR state, hydrate issue comments, PR review comments, and bot reviews, refresh mergeability against current main, rebase or narrowly fix conflicts if needed, run Codex /review, address any findings, and run targeted validation for each non-security PR. PR #77736 is excluded from this fix artifact because it is routed separately to central security handling.
repair_candidate.pr_title: chore(clownfish): complete remediation preflight for inventory shard 87
repair_candidate.pr_body: Plan-only repair artifact for Clownfish inventory shard live-pr-inventory-20260617T015524-087. This should not open a replacement PR by default. Repair each non-security contributor branch in place where maintainer_can_modify remains true, preserve original authorship, hydrate reviews and bot comments, run Codex /review, run targeted validation, and only then emit merge_candidate for PRs with complete merge_preflight. PR #77736 is excluded because it is routed separately to central OpenClaw security handling.
